candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue/sales figure for the income statement.
This is clearly the operating cost of materials/production and best represents COGS versus a balance sheet inventory account.
Inventory balance, not a period expense; not appropriate for COGS.
Typical SG&A personnel/overhead component, but an explicit SG&A total exists and is populated.
Likely includes various operating overheads, but there is an explicit SG&A row.
Smaller specific overhead item; still an SG&A-type cost but redundant given explicit SG&A.
Explicit SG&A line, well populated in recent years; per hierarchy, when such a row exists and is populated, select ONLY this row for XSGA.
Share-based comp typically part of SG&A, but explicit SG&A total row should be used alone per instructions.
Balance sheet item (liability/equity component), not a P&L expense line for SG&A.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row is present and populated, so per rules it is the sole XSGA_COMPONENTS selection.
No R&D-related row is present among candidates; treat XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Represents earnings before interest and taxes, not interest expense itself.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on bank borrowings and leasing
candidates.why: Primary interest expense on bank debt and leases; core component of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense related to lease liabilities; another core interest expense component.
Residual category of interest expense not captured elsewhere; should be included for total interest cost.
Represents allocation of net income, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity allocation, not interest.
Equity holders’ share of income, not interest.
Allocation of profit, not financing cost.
Generic label, but appears unused here; more specific populated interest lines are preferable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; could double count if combined with main lease-interest line.
Equity section item, not interest expense.
Equity section item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on bank borrowings and leasing
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Uses the main interest expense components; excludes EBIT, equity allocations, and supplemental/balance-sheet lines to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Profit attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement flow, not a stock measure of equity.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity instruments
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.
Specific asset or investment, not book equity of the company.
Major component of equity but not the full total, which is available separately.
Subcomponent of equity, not total equity.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity; best representation of book equity.
Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity, but acceptable if only P&L figure were needed.
Duplicate concept to non-controlling interests on P&L.
Represents parent shareholders, not minority interest.
P&L allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
Balance sheet minority interest line; best representation of MIB even if currently zero.
Alternative label for minority interest; appears redundant with Non-controlling Interests here.

variables.notes: Uses the balance sheet minority interest line as the book value of non-controlling interests.
